name: Knight of Despair

sheet.name: Knight of Despair
sheet.background_story:
Current: Survived first battle, entering final at the church.

Captivated by the berserker from Mt. Turlo known as Elise, the Knight of Despair engaged Merlin with a desperate request after witnessing her being slain in the Festival Tournament. 

With his new form, Knight of Despair hopes to converse with Elise as well as escape the torments of the Moon.. 

None of this however detours him from his main quest.. Seeking Zo.
